channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Top-rated fans for home cooling in 2026: expert reviews
item.description: As UK summers grow increasingly unpredictable, having an effective fan at home is becoming essential. While air conditioners remain costly and impractical for many, high-quality fans offer a more acce...

item.title: Understanding Vitamin B12: Importance, Risks, and Cancer Associations
item.description: Vitamin B12, also known as cobalamin, is a vital nutrient essential for red blood cell production, nervous system health, and DNA synthesis and repair. It is naturally present in animal-based foods su...

item.title: Teachers and Students Petition CHED to Review Proposed Changes to General Education Curriculum
item.description: On May 12, 2026, teachers, students, and advocacy groups gathered at the Commission on Higher Education (CHED) central office in Quezon City to file petitions opposing the proposed overhaul of the gen...

item.title: Trump discusses possibility of Venezuela joining US after Maduro's arrest
item.description: US President Donald Trump don cause serious talk around di world after e yan say e dey seriously consider to make Venezuela di 51st state of America. Dis statement come small months after US forces ca...

item.title: Tennessee law allows judicial removal for non-cooperation with federal immigration authorities
item.description: Tennessee Governor Bill Lee has signed legislation that could lead to the removal of state judges who fail to cooperate with federal immigration authorities, including Immigration and Customs Enforcem...

item.title: Julianne Phillips: A Look Back at Her Modeling and Acting Career in the 1980s
item.description: Julianne Phillips, born May 6, 1960, rose to fame in the 1980s as a successful model and emerging actress, best known for her marriage to rock legend Bruce Springsteen from 1985 to 1989. With her tall...

item.title: Voi Court Convicts Police Officer for 2019 Killing of Civilian
item.description: A former police officer, CPL Mark David Gitahi Marombe, has been convicted of murdering an unarmed civilian, Esau Juma Mwanguku, in March 2019. The incident occurred at Rockland Club in Voi, Taita Tav...

item.title: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigns amid dispute over flavored vape approvals
item.description: Marty Makary, the Commissioner of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, resigned from his position on Tuesday after ongoing tensions with President Donald Trump regarding flavored vape nicotine produ...

item.title: Nollywood Actor Alex Ekubo Passes Away at 40 After Battling Illness
item.description: Popular Nollywood actor Alex Ekubo, wey hail from Arochukwu in Abia State, don die at di age of 40. Di talented actor, model and entertainer wey born on April 10, 1986 for Port Harcourt, Rivers State,...

item.title: Harman urges Starmer to include Burnham in the Cabinet to strengthen the team
item.description: Labour politician Harriet Harman has suggested that Keir Starmer should consider appointing Andy Burnham to the Cabinet in order to assemble a more diverse and talented leadership team. Harman highlig...

item.title: Guidelines for Residents in Syokimau After Hyena Sightings
item.description: Residents in Syokimau and neighbouring estates have been advised to stay alert following reports of a hyena seen near Mwananchi Road off Eastport Drive. The Kenya Wildlife Service (KWS) has stepped up...

item.title: Four-year-old twins succumb to smoke inhalation in Johannesburg informal settlement fire
item.description: In a tragic incident on Tuesday, four-year-old twins lost their lives in a shack fire at the Zamimpilo informal settlement in Highgate, Johannesburg. Firefighters from the City of Johannesburg emergen...

item.title: Seme Customs Controller Adenuga Arrested Over Alleged Illegal Border Smuggling
item.description: According to sources wey SaharaReporters yarn, the former Seme Customs Controller, Comptroller Wale Adenuga, don dey face investigation after dem arrest am over one alleged illegal border gate wey dey...

item.title: KPLC announces planned power interruptions in Nairobi and four other counties for maintenance on May 13
item.description: Kenya Power and Lighting Company (KPLC) has announced scheduled electricity interruptions affecting several parts of the country on Wednesday, May 13, as part of routine system maintenance. The planne...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Photos and Stories from George Clooney’s Work on The Peacemaker (1997)
item.description: This article presents a collection of behind-the-scenes photographs from the 1997 film The Peacemaker, offering a glimpse into George Clooney’s early years as a rising Hollywood star. At the time, Clo...

item.title: Treasury models extreme $200 oil price scenario amid Iran conflict risks and global supply shocks
item.description: The article examines a striking scenario outlined in Australia’s federal budget papers, in which Treasury has modelled an extreme global energy shock that pushes oil prices up to US$200 per barrel. Th...

item.title: Duterte Plans to Appoint Peter Haynes as Lawyer for ICC Case
item.description: Former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte is planning to appoint Peter Haynes, an expert in international criminal and humanitarian law, as his new lawyer for the crimes against humanity case at the...

item.title: Yoweri Museveni Begins Seventh Term As Uganda’s President Amid Controversy
item.description: Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni don start him seventh term after nearly 40 years for power. The inauguration happen for Kololo Independence Grounds, Kampala, with plenty supporters dey witness the c...

item.title: Canada Reminds Households of Census Requirements and Potential Fines
item.description: May 12, 2026, marks Census Day in Canada, prompting households to submit their census questionnaires. The Census of Population occurs every five years under the Statistics Act, and participation is ma...

item.title: Anastasia Sierra Explores Motherhood, Aging, and Memory in 'The Witching Hour'
item.description: This interview features photographer Anastasia Sierra discussing her ongoing project 'The Witching Hour,' a cinematic and emotionally layered photographic series that explores motherhood, aging, and f...
